notes: Keyed by stash-relative POSIX relPath (never an absolute path). Walked via walkStashFlat, the same git-ls-files-based walker the real indexer uses; MANIFEST.json (fixture metadata, not an asset) is excluded. Values are the raw MatchResult ({type, specificity, renderer, meta?}) runMatchers returns, or null if no matcher claims the file (does not occur for any file in this fixture).
